_groq_api_key_help: Paste your own free Groq API key from https://console.groq.com/keys . Required.
_mode_help: quick = fastest/cheapest (turbo STT + 8B cleanup). smart = same fast STT + 70B cleanup. accurate = full whisper STT + 70B cleanup. max = full whisper STT + 120B cleanup (best quality, slowest).
_language_help: auto = Whisper auto-detects. Or force an ISO-639-1 code: ar, he, en, es, fr, de, hi, ur, fa, ru, zh, ja.
_type_method_help: auto/wtype = type letter-by-letter, any language incl. RTL. ydotool = type, ASCII/Latin only. clipboard = paste everything at once instantly (your clipboard is restored afterward).
_uncensored_help: Literature mode: transcribes profanity verbatim and never softens it.
_append_space_help: Add a trailing space after dictated text so consecutive dictations flow.
_cleanup_enabled_help: true = LLM cleans up the raw transcript (removes fillers, fixes grammar). false = fastest: type the raw transcript with no LLM pass.
_custom_instructions_help: Optional personal style/formatting rules added to the cleanup pass, e.g. 'Use British spelling', 'Format lists as bullet points', 'Keep everything lowercase'. Tunes style only; it never makes JSpeak answer or translate the dictation. Only applies when cleanup is on.
_max_tokens_help: Cap on the cleaned-text length. Raise for very long dictations.
_hotkey_help: Push-to-talk chord. modifiers = any of ctrl/shift/alt/super. key = optional single key (space, a-z, 0-9, f1-f12) or null.
_activation_help: hold = record while the chord is held. toggle = press once to start, again to stop.
_min_hold_help: How long the chord must be held before recording starts (hold mode).
_min_record_help: Recordings shorter than this are discarded as accidental.
_cancel_on_esc_help: Press Esc while recording to throw the take away without typing anything.
_trim_silence_help: Trim leading/trailing silence before upload (faster, cheaper). Conservative; keeps padding.
_always_record_help: Keep the microphone capturing continuously into a memory buffer and only slice/upload the held segment. Removes the recorder start-up lag on each press (lower latency) at the cost of holding the mic open the whole time. Linux only.
_input_device_help: Microphone to record from, by name. Empty = system default. Pick from the list in Settings.
_voice_commands_help: Spoken formatting. Built-in: 'new line', 'new paragraph', 'new bullet', and 'scratch that'/'delete that' (deletes the previous sentence). Add your own under custom as "phrase": "replacement".

overlay._help: Screen-edge glow. reduce_motion=true (default) = static glow, 0% CPU. Set false for a breathing pulse.

dictionary._help: terms = names/words it mishears (bias recognition + keep spelling). replacements = explicit wrong->right fixes (case-insensitive, whole word).
